rationale.R1.3: The agent thoroughly audited each load-bearing claim against the corresponding tables and figures, identifying multiple instances where evidence did not support claims.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flagged uncertainty for several key claims, such as the conflicting PIT results and untraceable improvement percentages, marking confidence issues for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output mostly stayed within scope but had one minor drift discussing sample description, which was less critical to the main claims.
rationale.RX.4: The agent identified harmful patterns in the original text without introducing new errors or regressions.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites were traced, but minor edits lacked traceability.
